title: pilosella subtardans
intro: Pilosella subtardans, also known as Red Knapweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Pilosella subtardans include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Pilosella subtardans can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
